ValidationRule.description: VR-006: Blocks save when tiering to a prior EIS older than 5 years without supplementation review. Addresses failure_to_supplement challenge type (100% agency loss rate in PermitTEC). Requires both tiering checkbox and prior NEPA date to be set.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(nepa_review_type__c, "EIS"), nepa_tiering_to_prior_eis__c = true, NOT(ISBLANK(nepa_prior_nepa_date__c)), nepa_prior_nepa_date__c < (TODAY() - 1825), nepa_supplementation_review_complete__c = false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The prior EIS is more than 5 years old. A supplementation review is required under 40 CFR 1502.9(c). Check "Supplementation Review Complete" after the responsible official makes a written determination.
